title: Smartenergy and Q8 Aviation Sign Off-Take Partnership Agreement for e-SAF
content:
Smartenergy, a Swiss-based renewable energy investment firm, has signed a landmark offtake partnership with Q8 Aviation, the international aviation energy arm of Kuwait Petroleum International. The agreement positions Q8 Aviation as a cornerstone long-term customer for Smartenergyâ€™s planned production of synthetic sustainable aviation fuel (eSAF), reinforcing both companiesâ€™ roles in advancing aviation decarbonization.

Through this partnership, Q8 Aviation will secure future eSAF volumes to meet customer needs and comply with mandates such as REFuelEU Aviation and the UK SAF mandate. eSAF, produced from renewable hydrogen and captured biogenic COâ‚‚, offers over 90% lifecycle emissions reductions compared to fossil jet fuel and can be seamlessly integrated into existing aircraft and infrastructure.

The partnership will initially focus on Smartenergyâ€™s flagship Project Galileu and Project LeÃ§a in Portugal, both designed to meet stringent EU RED III RFNBO sustainability standards. By combining Smartenergyâ€™s expertise in renewable energy and Q8 Aviationâ€™s global reach, the collaboration aims to close the supply gap, scale eSAF production, and accelerate the aviation sectorâ€™s transition toward net zero.
author: Analysts Account
